The '''Reconstruction Authority''' was the committee created by the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] after the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] to help rebuild [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] from the devastation resulting from the war. The Authority was tasked with such things as re-[[Terraforming/Legends|terraforming]] [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], finding a new [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] for the [[Ithorian/Legends|Ithorians]] and other [[Species/Legends|species]] that lost their homes to the [[Yuuzhan Vong]], and more. The Authority also granted the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi]] a new [[New Jedi Temple|Jedi Temple]] on Coruscant as thanks for their help in the War.
